Books

Authored and published works

This section is reserved for books that represent the scholarly profile of Dr. Haitham A. El-Ghareeb, with room for descriptions, publication details, and future dedicated entries.

Section purpose

A structured bibliography-facing space

The books page is intended to gather authored works in a readable format that can later expand into individual book pages with richer scholarly and publication metadata.

Current stage

Prepared for gradual entry

The final list of titles is not entered yet, but the site structure is already ready to receive books progressively without another redesign.

Expected information for each title

  • Full title.
  • Short descriptive summary.
  • Publication details or year.
  • Relevant external links when available.

Initial sample entries

Provisional items ready for later editing

Provisional entry for later revision

Foundations of Methodical Scholarly Writing

A provisional entry for a book concerned with scholarly writing, research structure, and disciplined academic presentation.

About the site

Dr. Haitham A. El-Ghareeb | Personal Scholarly Website

An initial launch edition of a bilingual scholarly website presenting academic work, publications, and research directions.

Current status
